## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Validation

List what you ran to verify this change.

```bash
cargo fmt
cargo check
cargo test
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept this PR focused on a single change.
- [ ] I updated docs for user-visible behavior changes.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where applicable.
- [ ] I verified no sensitive information is included.

## Notes

Any follow-up work, tradeoffs, or known limitations.
